pages.text: A reusable scroll. Where vanilla ISS scrolls are single-use, the Elementium variant pulls cast cost from your Botania mana network at a 1000:1 ratio. If no Botania mana is available, the scroll gracefully falls back to single-use behavior — it consumes itself instead of fizzling.

pages.title: Crafting
pages.text: Take any ISS scroll, an Elementium ingot, and Pixie Dust into the $(thing)Alfheim Portal$(). The trade preserves the bound spell while promoting the scroll to its reusable form.
